blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Skibowl is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,284 ft. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.3" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 22.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 9" over the past week. Current depth: 34".
